system.description: Naga Venom: This Poison needs to be injected to be effective. It is naturally produced by a type of snake common in the west in a gland near their jaw, but this can be removed and used by others. Dipping a weapon into Naga venom is sufficient for one dose. It causes violent shaking once it takes hold, within minutes and kills in 1d10 days.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 2: Rules
